## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm generate-types` run (if API routes/schemas changed)
- [ ] No credentials or tokens in code or logs
- [ ] No `any` types introduced (use `unknown` with narrowing)
